abap_snippet: REPORT z_sales_order_report. SELECT vbak~vbeln, vbak~auart, vbak~erdat, kna1~name1, vbap~matnr, vbap~kwmeng, vbap~netwr FROM vbak INNER JOIN vbap ON vbak~vbeln = vbap~vbeln INNER JOIN kna1 ON vbak~kunnr = kna1~kunnr INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_sales) WHERE vbak~auart IN ('OR', 'TA') AND vbak~erdat >= '20240101'. LOOP AT lt_sales INTO DATA(ls_sales). WRITE: / ls_sales-vbeln, ls_sales-name1, ls_sales-netwr. ENDLOOP.
gaps: ABAP WRITE statements for output formatting cannot be represented in Snowflake SQL

LOOP AT and WRITE logic cannot be represented in SQL - requires application layer
generated_sql_snippet: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW z_sales_order_report AS SELECT vbak.vbeln, vbak.auart, vbak.erdat, kna1.name1, vbap.matnr, vbap.kwmeng, vbap.netwr FROM vbak INNER JOIN vbap ON vbak.vbeln = vbap.vbeln INNER JOIN kna1 ON vbak.kunnr = kna1.kunnr WHERE vbak.auart IN ('OR', 'TA') AND vbak.erdat >= '20240101';
